headlines.headline: Talvyn Goods to present at Corporate Strategy Symposium

sentiment.reasoning: Presenting at a symposium is a standard corporate communication event that rarely impacts financial valuation directly.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
